---
title: "test_phase_88_path_sovereignty.test.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/test_phase_88_path_sovereignty.test.ts"
loc: 28
complexity: 1
logic_score: 8.00
style_score: 9.25
intel_score: 8.54
overall_score: 9.00
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 9.2/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.5/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 9 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://node:test)
- [*](file://node:assert)
- [getTracesForFile](file://../src/tools/pennyone/intel/database)
- [saveTrace](file://../src/tools/pennyone/intel/database)

### Exports
- `unixPath`
- `winPath`
- `missionId`
- `winResults`
- `unixResults`
- `maliciousPath`
- `results`
